results.title: Global competency framework for regulators of medicines
results.description: A comprehensive framework developed by WHO to strengthen regulatory workforce competencies for medicines regulation worldwide.

results.title: WHO quality management competency framework
results.description: Defines core and advanced competencies for quality management systems in medicine regulatory environments.

results.title: WHO pharmacovigilance competency framework
results.description: Supports capability building for safety signal detection, risk communication, and post-market surveillance.

results.title: WHO inspection and compliance framework
results.description: Competency map for GMP inspections, enforcement readiness, and corrective action oversight.

results.title: WHO digital regulation competency framework
results.description: Builds regulator skills for digital submissions, data integrity, and electronic document workflows.

results.title: WHO clinical evaluation competency framework
results.description: Framework for evidence review, benefit-risk evaluation, and clinical dossier assessment competency.
